name: Supply Chain Compromise
description: Attack tree modelling compromise through third-party suppliers, software dependencies, and integration paths
root_objective: Compromise target organisation through its supply chain and third-party integrations

nodes.title: Compromise via Supply Chain
nodes.description: Gain access to the target organisation by compromising a trusted third-party supplier, software dependency, or integration path

nodes.title: Compromise Software Dependency
nodes.description: Insert malicious code through an upstream software package or library

nodes.title: Typosquatting Package Attack
nodes.description: Publish malicious package with name similar to popular legitimate package on public registry

nodes.title: Compromise Maintainer Account
nodes.description: Take over a legitimate package maintainer's account to push malicious update

nodes.title: Compromise Managed Service Provider
nodes.description: Attack a managed service provider to gain access to multiple downstream customers

nodes.title: Abuse MSP Remote Management Tools
nodes.description: Exploit MSP's remote monitoring and management (RMM) tools to deploy payloads to customer environments

nodes.title: Exploit Third-Party Integration
nodes.description: Abuse API connections, SSO federation, or data sharing agreements with trusted third parties

nodes.title: Abuse OAuth Integration
nodes.description: Compromise a third-party app with OAuth access to target's email, files, or APIs

nodes.title: Pivot via Federated SSO Trust
nodes.description: Compromise a federated identity provider to gain access tokens for the target organisation
